---
title: ""
page-layout: full
navbar: false
---

```{=html}
<p id="datetime"></p>

<script>
  var now = new Date();
  var datetime = now.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById("datetime").innerHTML = datetime;
</script>

<p style="text-align: center;">Please fill out the attendance for today at this <a href="https://forms.gle/qjkA5wqtHH7AzTuq6">attendance form link</a>. Ensure you are connected to campus wifi and logged in to the University Gmail.</p>
```
